name: CLI quiet mode implementation
summary: --quiet/-q flag suppresses startup UI, warnings, and checks with specific precedence over verbose and settings.
detail: Implemented --quiet/-q flag in cli/args.ts. Precedence: CLI --quiet > CLI --verbose > settings quietStartup. Suppresses header/logo, keybindings, auto-update/version checks, deprecation warnings, credential migration, models.json errors, and model fallback warnings. Reuses existing quietStartup settings plumbing.
